hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json
try:
    d = json.load(sys.stdin)
    prompt = d.get('user_prompt', '').lower()
    keywords = ['로고','logo','색상','color','배지','badge','카피','copy','마케팅','marketing','브랜드','brand','타이포','font','디자인','design','아이콘','icon','typography','palette']
    if any(k in prompt for k in keywords):
        content = open('/Volumes/My Passport for Mac/My_project/pickedbyai/docs/brand-guide.md').read()
        print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'UserPromptSubmit', 'additionalContext': '[브랜드 가이드 자동 주입]\n\n' + content}}))
except:
    pass
"
